title: ""
---
title: "Technical Deep Dives"
description: "Deep technical analyses, architecture notes, and product explorations."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: cards
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

---

<div class="container--narrow">
<div class="site-hero">
  <h1>Technical Deep Dives & Product Explorations</h1>
  <p class="lead">This site hosts long-form, practical analyses of tools and products I use — focusing on architecture, trade-offs, and real-world fit.</p>
</div>
</div>

::: listing

:::
---
